text: Iran's Foreign Ministry spokesman Esmail Baghaei: The United States’ so-called “blockade” of Iran’s ports or coastline is not only a violation of Pakistani-mediated ceasefire but also both unlawful and criminal. Moreover, by deliberately inflicting collective punishment on the Iranian population, it amounts to war crime and crime against humanity.
text_zh: 伊朗外交部发言人伊斯梅尔·巴盖里：美国对伊朗港口或海岸线的所谓“封锁”，不仅违反了巴基斯坦斡旋的停火协议，而且既不合法也是犯罪。此外，通过蓄意对伊朗人民实施集体惩罚，这构成了战争罪和危害人类罪。

text: U.N. Ambassador Mike Waltz says JD Vance will lead the American delegation to Islamabad for talks with Iran. Source: ABC News
text_zh: 联合国大使迈克·沃尔兹表示，JD·万斯将率领美国代表团前往伊斯兰堡与伊朗进行会谈。来源：ABC新闻

text: 🇺🇸 ⚡️ 🇮🇷 Trump: Iran will be completely destroyed if it refuses to sign the agreement.
text_zh: 🇺🇸 ⚡️ 🇮🇷 特朗普：如果伊朗拒绝签署协议，它将被彻底摧毁。

text: Faytuks News Trump tells Fox News that if Iran doesn't sign this deal "the whole country is going to get blown up" 🚨 BREAKING: President Trump tells FOX News' @TreyYingst that this is the "last chance" for Iran to agree to a deal, vowing to not make the same mistake as former President Obama. "If Iran does not sign this deal, the whole country is getting blown up," Trump said. https://twitter.com/FoxNews/status/2045842579749470699/video/1 - Fox News tweet
text_zh: Faytuks News 特朗普告诉福克斯新闻，如果伊朗不签署这项协议，“整个国家都将被炸毁” 🚨 突发：特朗普总统告诉福克斯新闻的 @TreyYingst，这是伊朗同意达成协议的“最后机会”，并誓言不会犯下与前总统奥巴马同样的错误。“如果伊朗不签署这项协议，整个国家都将被炸毁，”特朗普说。https://twitter.com/FoxNews/status/2045842579749470699/video/1 - 福克斯新闻推文

text: Open Source Intel Trump: "If they don't sign the agreement we will blow up the whole country. Power plants and bridges will become legitimate targets." Kushner and Witkoff are on their way to Islamabad to resume talks. The political and security cabinet meets tomorrow. tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel 特朗普：“如果他们不签署协议，我们将炸毁整个国家。发电厂和桥梁将成为合法目标。”库什纳和威特科夫正在前往伊斯兰堡恢复会谈的路上。政治和安全内阁明天开会。推文

text: Open Source Intel Trump: We are offering a very fair and reasonable deal, and I hope they will agree to it, because if not, the United States is going to destroy every power plant and every bridge in Iran. No more Mr. Nice Guy! They will fall fast, they will fall easily, and if they don't get the deal, I would be honored to do what needs to be done, what has needed to be done to Iran, by other presidents, for the last 47 years. It's time for the Iranian killing machine to end! tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel 特朗普：我们提供了一项非常公平合理的协议，我希望他们会同意，因为如果不这样，美国将摧毁伊朗的每一座发电厂和每一座桥梁。不再做老好人了！他们会很快倒下，很容易倒下，如果他们不达成协议，我很荣幸能做需要做的事情，即过去47年来其他总统对伊朗需要做的事情。是时候结束伊朗的杀人机器了！推文

text: ↩️ Reply to OSINT Open Source Intel Trump: Iran decided to fire bullets yesterday in the Strait of Hormuz — A Total Violation of our Ceasefire Agreement! Many of them were aimed at a French Ship, and a Freighter from the United Kingdom. That wasn't nice, was it? My Representatives are going to Islamabad, Pakistan — They will be there tomorrow evening, for Negotiations. Iran recently announced that they were closing the Strait, which is strange, because our BLOCKADE has already closed it. They're helping us without knowing, and they are the ones that lose with the closed passage, $500 Million Dollars a day! The United States loses nothing. In fact, many Ships are headed, right now, to the U.S., Texas, Louisiana, and Alaska, to load up, compliments of the IRGC, always wanting to be “the tough guy!” We're offering a very fair and reasonable DEAL, and I hope they take it because, if they don't, the United States is going to knock out every single Power Plant, and every single Bridge, in Iran. NO MORE MR. NICE GUY! They'll come down fast, they'll come down easy and, if they don't take the DEAL, it will be my Honor to do what has to be done, which should have been done to Iran, by other Presidents, for the last 47 years. IT'S TIME FOR THE IRAN KILLING MACHINE TO END! President DONALD J. TRUMP tweet
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 OSINT Open Source Intel 特朗普：伊朗昨天决定在霍尔木兹海峡开火——这完全违反了我们的停火协议！其中许多子弹瞄准了一艘法国船只和一艘来自英国的货船。那可不友好，不是吗？我的代表们将前往巴基斯坦伊斯兰堡——他们明天晚上会到达那里进行谈判。伊朗最近宣布他们正在关闭海峡，这很奇怪，因为我们的封锁已经关闭了它。他们不知不觉地在帮助我们，而他们才是因通道关闭而损失的一方，每天损失5亿美元！美国什么也没损失。事实上，许多船只现在正前往美国、德克萨斯州、路易斯安那州和阿拉斯加州装载货物，这要归功于伊斯兰革命卫队，他们总是想当“硬汉”！我们提供了一项非常公平合理的协议，我希望他们接受，因为如果不接受，美国将摧毁伊朗的每一座发电厂和每一座桥梁。不再做老好人了！他们会很快倒下，很容易倒下，如果他们不接受协议，我很荣幸能做需要做的事情，即过去47年来其他总统对伊朗需要做的事情。是时候结束伊朗的杀人机器了！唐纳德·J·特朗普总统 推文

text: Faytuks News Witkoff & others are heading for Islamabad for talks. Vance will not go. Trump also says that Iran has violated the ceasefire agreement by firing on shipping and closing the SoH Trump says that if Iran doesn't agree to their deal, the United States is going to: "knock out every single Power Plant, and every single Bridge, in Iran. NO MORE MR. NICE GUY!" https://twitter.com/Faytuks/status/2045839137127780364/photo/1 - Faytuks News tweet
text_zh: Faytuks News 威特科夫等人正前往伊斯兰堡进行会谈。万斯不会去。特朗普还表示，伊朗通过向航运开火和关闭霍尔木兹海峡违反了停火协议。特朗普表示，如果伊朗不同意他们的协议，美国将：“摧毁伊朗的每一座发电厂和每一座桥梁。不再做老好人了！” https://twitter.com/Faytuks/status/2045839137127780364/photo/1 - Faytuks News 推文

text: Open Source Intel No new date set for the next round of U.S.-Iran talks, but Pakistan is preparing to host, according to al-Mayadeen's Islamabad correspondent. tweet

text: OSINTtechnical Trump, in an early morning post, says that after violating the ceasefire, if Iran does not take the US-offered peace deal, "the United States is going to knock out every single Power Plant, and every single Bridge" in Iran. Adds "NO MORE MR. NICE GUY!" https://twitter.com/Osinttechnical/status/2045839473301238057/photo/1 tweet

He will also be awarded the Israeli President’s Medal of Honour… officially for being part of that VERY EXCLUSIVE, EXTREMELY NORMAL “special club” 🚩 @RezistanceTrench

text: Trump said Iran war negotiations will resume this week as Steve Witkoff travels to Pakistan, with Jared Kushner also joining talks. “Steve’s going to be going there tomorrow night,” Trump said, adding the next round is set for Tuesday in Islamabad. JD Vance, who led earlier talks, will not attend. Source: New York Post
text_zh: 特朗普表示，随着史蒂夫·威特科夫前往巴基斯坦，贾里德·库什纳也将加入会谈，伊朗战争谈判将于本周恢复。特朗普说：“史蒂夫明天晚上要去那里”，并补充说下一轮谈判定于周二在伊斯兰堡举行。此前领导早期会谈的JD·万斯将不会出席。来源：纽约邮报

text: Trump to Fox News: If Iran does not sign this deal, the whole country is getting blown up.
text_zh: 特朗普对福克斯新闻表示：如果伊朗不签署这项协议，整个国家都将被炸毁。

text: Judges approved Netanyahu’s request to cancel his testimony scheduled for tomorrow, citing “security and political constraints.”
text_zh: 法官批准了内塔尼亚胡取消原定于明天作证的请求，理由是“安全和政治限制”。

text: Spanish PM Pedro Sánchez: On Tuesday, the Spanish Government will bring to Europe the proposal that the European Union should break its association agreement with Israel. And we are going to do it—not because we have anything against Israel; on the contrary, we are a people who are friends of the Israeli people—but we do not agree with the actions being carried out by its government. And any government that violates international law, and therefore violates the principles and values of the European Union, cannot be a partner of the European Union.
text_zh: 西班牙首相佩德罗·桑切斯：周二，西班牙政府将向欧洲提出建议，即欧盟应终止与以色列的联系国协定。我们这样做并不是因为我们对以色列有什么成见；恰恰相反，我们是与以色列人民友好的民族，但我们不同意其政府所采取的行动。任何违反国际法，从而违反欧盟原则和价值观的政府，都不能成为欧盟的伙伴。

text: 🇺🇸 ⚡️ 🇮🇷 Trump reacts to Iran’s closure of the Strait of Hormuz: Iran decided to fire bullets yesterday in the Strait of Hormuz - A Total Violation of our Ceasefire Agreement! Many of them were aimed at a French Ship, and a Freighter from the United Kingdom. That wasn't nice, was it? Iran recently announced that they were closing the Strait, which is strange, because our BLOCKADE has already closed it. We’re offering a very fair and reasonable DEAL, and I hope they take it because, if they don’t, the United States is going to knock out every single Power Plant, and every single Bridge, in Iran.
text_zh: 🇺🇸 ⚡️ 🇮🇷 特朗普对伊朗关闭霍尔木兹海峡做出反应：伊朗昨天决定在霍尔木兹海峡开火——这完全违反了我们的停火协议！其中许多子弹瞄准了一艘法国船只和一艘来自英国的货船。这可不友好，不是吗？伊朗最近宣布他们要关闭海峡，这很奇怪，因为我们的封锁已经将其关闭了。我们提供了一项非常公平合理的协议，我希望他们接受，因为如果他们不接受，美国将摧毁伊朗境内的每一座发电厂和每一座桥梁。

text: 🇮🇷 ⚡️ 🇺🇸 Two more oil tankers were forced to turn back in the Strait of Hormuz 🔹 Following the continued naval blockade by Iran, Iranian armed forces today turned back two additional oil tankers from passing through the Strait of Hormuz. 🔹 The two tankers, sailing under the flags of Botswana and Angola, intended to transit through this strategic waterway but were forced to change course and retreat due to the timely action of the armed forces of the Islamic Republic of Iran. 🚩 @RezistanceTrench
text_zh: 🇮🇷 ⚡️ 🇺🇸 两艘油轮在霍尔木兹海峡被迫折返 🔹 在伊朗持续的海上封锁之后，伊朗武装部队今天迫使另外两艘油轮无法通过霍尔木兹海峡。 🔹 这两艘悬挂博茨瓦纳和安哥拉国旗的油轮原计划通过这条战略水道，但由于伊朗伊斯兰共和国武装部队的及时行动，被迫改变航向并撤退。 🚩 @RezistanceTrench

text: 🇺🇸 Trump woke up and posted that his representatives are going to Islamabad 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: BREAKING: Trump: Iran decided to fire bullets yesterday in the Strait of Hormuz — A Total Violation of our Ceasefire Agreement! Many were aimed at a French Ship and a Freighter from the United Kingdom. My Representatives are going to Islamabad, Pakistan — They will be there tomorrow evening for Negotiations. Iran announced they were closing the Strait, but our BLOCKADE has already closed it. They lose $500 Million Dollars a day, the United States loses nothing. We’re offering a fair DEAL — if they don’t take it, the United States is going to knock out every Power Plant and every Bridge in Iran. NO MORE MR. NICE GUY! IT’S TIME FOR THE IRAN KILLING MACHINE TO END!
text_zh: 突发：特朗普：伊朗昨天决定在霍尔木兹海峡开火——这完全违反了我们的停火协议！许多子弹瞄准了一艘法国船只和一艘来自英国的货船。我的代表们正前往巴基斯坦伊斯兰堡——他们将于明晚抵达那里进行谈判。伊朗宣布他们要关闭海峡，但我们的封锁已经将其关闭了。他们每天损失5亿美元，美国什么也没损失。我们提供了一项公平的协议——如果他们不接受，美国将摧毁伊朗境内的每一座发电厂和每一座桥梁。不再做老好人了！是时候终结伊朗的杀戮机器了！

Many of them were aimed at a French Ship, and a Freighter from the United Kingdom. That wasn’t nice, was it? My Representatives are going to Islamabad, Pakistan — They will be there tomorrow evening, for Negotiations. text_zh: ELINT News 转推 @BarakRavid : 🚨 🚨 特朗普在“真实社交”（Truth Social）上表示：伊朗昨天决定在霍尔木兹海峡开火——这完全违反了我们的停火协议！其中许多子弹瞄准了一艘法国船只和一艘来自英国的货船。这可不友好，不是吗？我的代表们正前往巴基斯坦伊斯兰堡——他们将于明晚抵达那里进行谈判。伊朗最近宣布他们要关闭海峡，这很奇怪，因为我们的封锁已经将其关闭了。他们是在不知情的情况下帮助了我们，而且他们才是因通道关闭而蒙受损失的一方，每天损失5亿美元！美国什么也没损失。事实上，许多船只现在正前往美国、德克萨斯州、路易斯安那州和阿拉斯加州进行装载，这多亏了伊斯兰革命卫队（IRGC），他们总是想当“硬汉”！我们提供了一项非常公平合理的协议，我希望他们接受，因为如果他们不接受，美国将摧毁伊朗境内的每一座发电厂和每一座桥梁。不再做老好人了！它们会迅速倒塌，轻而易举地倒塌，如果他们不接受协议，我将很荣幸地去做必须做的事情，而这本应在过去47年里由其他总统对伊朗完成。是时候终结伊朗的杀戮机器了！推文

text: WarTranslated Trump says Iran committed a "serious violation" during the truce but insists a peace deal will still be reached per ABC News. Iran says it has closed the Strait of Hormuz again over a US blockade. The IRGC says the US did not fulfill its obligations. - WarTranslated tweet
text_zh: WarTranslated 特朗普表示，伊朗在休战期间犯下了“严重违规”行为，但据美国广播公司新闻（ABC News）报道，他坚持认为仍将达成和平协议。伊朗表示，由于美国的封锁，它再次关闭了霍尔木兹海峡。伊斯兰革命卫队称美国没有履行其义务。 - WarTranslated 推文

text: Open Source Intel Turkish Foreign Minister Hakan Fidan on Israel-Cyprus-Greece alliance: This is not only a source of concern for Turkey. All Muslim countries in the region are seriously worried and asking questions, especially considering Israel’s recent expansionist and aggressive policies in the region. It is not correct to claim that Turkey is unnecessarily creating concern here. There are realities, there are facts, there are people’s concerns. Turkey is capable of protecting itself. But there are countries in the region that are weaker in nature and look at this military alliance with concern. tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel 土耳其外交部长哈坎·菲丹谈及以色列-塞浦路斯-希腊联盟：这不仅是土耳其担忧的来源。该地区所有穆斯林国家都深感担忧并提出质疑，特别是考虑到以色列近期在该地区采取的扩张主义和侵略性政策。声称土耳其在此无端制造担忧是不正确的。现实存在，事实存在，人们的担忧也存在。土耳其有能力保护自己。但该地区有一些本质上较弱的国家，它们带着担忧看待这一军事联盟。推文

text: 🇺🇦 🇨🇦 Footage has surfaced of a 2015 conversation between George Soros and Chrystia Freeland, now serving as Zelensky's adviser on Ukraine's economic development. In the exchange, both openly acknowledged that Ukraine's post-Maidan government was stocked with individuals connected to Soros's Open Society network. "Everyone who I know in that group has been touched somehow by Open Society," Freeland says. "Like literally, either people personally got a scholarship or, you know, their wife got a scholarship. It's a really remarkable thing." Soros responded: "I didn't realize actually how big an effect it has had over a 25-year period, because those were students. Twenty-five years later, they were leaders." Freeland, who until recently served as Canada's Deputy Prime Minister and Finance Minister, and whose grandfather Mykhailo Chomiak was a Nazi collaborator who edited a German-controlled Ukrainian newspaper during the occupation, has long maintained close ties to Soros and his network. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇺🇦 🇨🇦 一段2015年乔治·索罗斯与克里斯蒂娅·弗里兰（现任泽连斯基乌克兰经济发展顾问）的对话录像浮出水面。在交流中，两人公开承认乌克兰后广场革命政府中充斥着与索罗斯“开放社会”网络有关的人员。弗里兰说：“我认识的那个群体中的每个人都以某种方式受到过开放社会的影响。比如，要么是他们个人获得了奖学金，要么是他们的妻子获得了奖学金。这真是一件了不起的事情。”索罗斯回应道：“我实际上没有意识到它在25年里产生了如此大的影响，因为那时他们还是学生。25年后，他们成为了领导者。”弗里兰曾任加拿大副总理兼财政部长，其祖父米哈伊洛·乔米亚克（Mykhailo Chomiak）曾是纳粹合作者，在占领期间编辑过一份受德国控制的乌克兰报纸。弗里兰长期以来一直与索罗斯及其网络保持着密切联系。 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: ↩️ Reply to OSINT Visioner RT @NSTRIKE1231 : 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 🚀 U.S. intelligence and military officials assess that Iran still retains about 40% of its pre-war long-range strike drone arsenal and roughly 60% of its ballistic and cruise missile launchers. 🔹 During the two-week ceasefire that began on April 8, more than 100 systems previously trapped in underground facilities were reportedly recovered after excavators cleared blocked tunnel entrances caused by U.S. and Israeli strikes. 🔹 Some U.S. assessments also suggest Iran could restore up to 70% of its pre-war missile stockpile that had been buried under debris following attacks on bunkers and storage sites, officials told The New York Times. 🟦 This updated assessment builds on earlier intelligence indicating that about 30% of Iran’s ballistic missile capability had been destroyed, around 40% was trapped in underground bases due to collapsed exits, and roughly 30% remained unaccounted for. 🟥 Overall, Iran appears to have used the ceasefire period effectively to recover military assets. At the same time, U.S. and Israeli officials emphasize that continuous surveillance — including satellite monitoring and other intelligence tools — is tracking the movement, storage, and redeployment of missile systems. See the latest updates with us: @NSTRIKE1231 tweet
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 OSINT Visioner 转发 @NSTRIKE1231：🇺🇸 🇮🇷 🚀 美国情报和军事官员评估称，伊朗仍保留了约40%的战前远程打击无人机库和约60%的弹道导弹及巡航导弹发射装置。 🔹 在4月8日开始的为期两周的停火期间，据报道，在挖掘机清理了因美国和以色列袭击而堵塞的隧道入口后，超过100套此前被困在地下设施中的系统被找回。 🔹 据《纽约时报》报道，一些美国评估还表明，伊朗可以恢复高达70%的战前导弹库存，这些导弹在针对掩体和储存点的袭击后被埋在瓦砾下。 🟦 这一最新评估建立在早先的情报基础上，该情报显示伊朗约30%的弹道导弹能力已被摧毁，约40%因出口坍塌而被困在地下基地，约30%下落不明。 🟥 总的来说，伊朗似乎有效地利用了停火期来恢复军事资产。与此同时，美国和以色列官员强调，持续的监视——包括卫星监测和其他情报工具——正在追踪导弹系统的移动、储存和重新部署。与我们一起查看最新更新：@NSTRIKE1231 推文
